hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '/\.env(\.[^/]+)?$' && { echo 'Refusing to edit .env file. Use the shell directly if you really need to modify it.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // empty) + " " + (.tool_input.command // empty)' | grep -qE '(public/spatialreal|rm -rf? .*public/spatialreal)' && jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qiE '(rm |unlink|delete)' && { echo 'Refusing: public/spatialreal/ holds the AvatarKit WASM the runtime fetches. Run /update-avatar-wasm to refresh it instead.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/middleware.ts) echo 'Note: src/middleware.ts is deprecated in Next 16. Consider migrating to src/proxy.ts (use the migrate-middleware-to-proxy subagent).' >&2 ;; esac; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx --no-install eslint --max-warnings 0 "$f" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */package-lock.json|*/package.json) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; pkg_wasm=$(find node_modules/@spatialwalk/avatarkit/dist -maxdepth 1 -name '*.wasm' 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs -n1 basename 2>/dev/null); src_wasm=$(grep -oE "avatar_core_wasm-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\.wasm" src/components/agent/SpatialRealAvatar.tsx 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$pkg_wasm" ] && [ -n "$src_wasm" ] && [ "$pkg_wasm" != "$src_wasm" ]; then echo "⚠️  AvatarKit WASM filename drift: package=$pkg_wasm src=$src_wasm — run /update-avatar-wasm" >&2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
